_comment: Usage hints appended to MCP tool descriptions before exposing them to agents. Each entry patches the description of a specific server/tool combination. Hints help agents use tool parameters correctly (e.g. avoiding CLI flags in structured parameters).

hints.hint: IMPORTANT: The `target` parameter accepts ONLY a branch name, commit hash, or tag — never CLI flags like `-b`. To create a new branch, set `createBranch: true` and pass the new branch name as `target`. Example: { target: "feature/my-branch", createBranch: true }
IMPORTANT: When pushing a branch for the first time (no upstream tracking configured), you MUST set `setUpstream: true` or the push will fail with "no upstream branch". Example: { setUpstream: true }
